notes: Registro pubblico di evidenze bibliografiche AMR riferite alla Sardegna. Gli studi sono eterogenei e non sono sommati come prevalenza regionale.

records.title: Comparative characterisation of human and ovine non-aureus staphylococci isolated in Sardinia (Italy) for antimicrobial susceptibility profiles and resistance genes
records.public_geography: Rete di tre ospedali: Sassari, Nuoro e Ozieri; campioni ovini regionali
records.notes: 195 NAS isolates: 125 ovine and 70 human; hospitals identified but human denominators not separable by facility; no municipal prevalence.

records.title: Antimicrobial susceptibility and genotyping of Staphylococcus aureus isolates collected between 1986 and 2015 from ovine mastitis
records.notes: PubMed record reports ovine mastitis isolates collected between 1986 and 2015; curated as study-level evidence, not regional prevalence.

records.title: The poultry chain in Sardinia (Italy): monitoring of Salmonella contamination and antibiotic resistance profiles
records.notes: Study-level food-chain evidence; not regional prevalence.

records.title: Genomic characterization of Staphylococcus aureus isolated from mastitis in small ruminants in Sardinia, Italy
records.notes: Study-level small-ruminant mastitis evidence; not regional prevalence.

records.title: Characterization and antimicrobial resistance of commensal and pathogenic Escherichia coli from pigs in Sardinia (Italy)
records.notes: Study-level swine evidence; not regional prevalence.

records.title: Salmonella and Yersinia enterocolitica through the pig meat chain in Sardinia: occurrence, antimicrobial resistance and genetic insight
records.notes: Study-level food-chain evidence; not regional prevalence.

records.title: Pathogenic profile and antimicrobial resistance of Escherichia coli, Escherichia marmotae and Escherichia ruysiae detected from hunted wild boars in Sardinia (Italy)
records.notes: Study-level wildlife/food-chain evidence; not regional prevalence.

records.title: Hunted Wild Boars in Sardinia: Prevalence, Antimicrobial Resistance and Genomic Analysis of Salmonella and Yersinia enterocolitica
records.notes: Study-level wildlife evidence; do not generalize prevalence beyond study design.

records.title: A Whole-Genome Sequencing-Based Approach for the Characterization of Klebsiella pneumoniae Co-Producing KPC and OXA-48-like Carbapenemases Circulating in Sardinia, Italy
records.notes: Facility-level clinical genomic evidence; Sassari is the hospital location, not patient origin or municipal prevalence.

records.title: Occult Vancomycin-Resistant Enterococcus faecium ST117 Displaying a Highly Mutated vanB2 Operon
records.notes: Facility-level cohort of 39 isolates collected in 2013-2018; three vanB2-positive, including one occult isolate missed by the initial Vitek2 result; not municipal prevalence.

records.title: Nosocomial transmission of carbapenem-resistant Klebsiella pneumoniae in an Italian university hospital: a molecular epidemiological study
records.notes: Facility-level cohort of 46 invasive KPC-Kp infections observed in 2015-2017; not municipal or regional prevalence.

records.title: Infection Prevention Control Strategies of New Delhi Metallo-beta-lactamase Producing Klebsiella pneumoniae
records.notes: Facility-level case report of two independent NDM-producing K. pneumoniae colonizations in 2021-2022; not municipal prevalence.

records.title: Prevalence, bioserotyping and antibiotic resistance of pathogenic Yersinia enterocolitica detected in pigs at slaughter in Sardinia
records.notes: Study-level swine slaughter evidence; do not generalize prevalence beyond study design.

records.title: Occurrence, Characterization, and Antimicrobial Susceptibility of Salmonella enterica in Slaughtered Pigs in Sardinia
records.notes: Study-level swine slaughter evidence; not regional prevalence.

records.title: Molecular detection of virulence factors and antibiotic resistance pattern in clinical Enterococcus faecalis strains in Sardinia
records.notes: Facility-level cohort of 91 clinical isolates from 91 patients; Cagliari is facility location, not patient residence; DOI not present in PubMed.

records.title: Lakes and lagoons used for drinking water supply and fisheries as sources of potentially pathogenic bacteria and antimicrobial resistance
records.notes: Site-level 2024 environmental evidence; exact sample coordinates excluded from public outputs.

records.title: Comparison of genotypic and phenotypic antimicrobial profile in carbapenemases producing Klebsiella pneumoniae
records.notes: Facility cohort of 109 CR-Kp in 2018-2022; possible overlap with other AOU Sassari KPC/OXA-48 studies; do not sum denominators.

records.title: High-Risk Clone of Klebsiella pneumoniae Co-Harbouring Class A and D Carbapenemases in Italy
records.notes: Facility cohort of 127 KPC/OXA-48-positive patients in 2019-2020; 31 invasive infections; possible overlap with other AOU cohorts.

records.title: Molecular typing of XDR Acinetobacter baumannii strains in an Italian ICU
records.notes: Sixteen typed XDR isolates inferred from reported PFGE clusters; all resistant to major antibiotics except colistin; collection period unavailable in open abstract.

records.title: Outbreak of multidrug-resistant Acinetobacter baumannii in an intensive care unit
records.public_geography: Ospedale San Francesco, Nuoro (sede della struttura)
records.notes: June 2012 outbreak: ten positive patients and two positive bed headboards; 12 ST31 isolates with blaOXA-51-like and blaOXA-23-like.

records.title: Comparison of microbiological and molecular diagnosis for identification of respiratory secondary infections in COVID-19 patients and their antimicrobial resistance patterns
records.notes: Prospective cohort of 70 COVID-19 patients in 2021-2022; oxacillin-resistant S. aureus and carbapenem-resistant K. pneumoniae detected; counts not inferred.

records.title: Evaluation of mycobacteria infection prevalence and optimization of the identification process in North Sardinia, Italy
records.public_geography: Sistema sanitario del Nord Sardegna; laboratorio AOU Sassari
records.notes: Area-wide cohort of 1836 suspected individuals in 2020-2023; 89 MTB-positive and 64 resistant to at least one first-line drug; no municipal split.

records.title: Genomic surveillance reveals antibiotic resistance gene transmission via phage recombinases within sheep mastitis-associated Streptococcus uberis
records.public_geography: 36 comuni esplicitamente indicati nel supplemento; pubblico solo aggregato comunale
records.notes: 46 isolati selezionati, uno per azienda e profilo RFLP; 45/46 resistenti ad almeno un antibiotico e 136/644 esiti R. Coorte selezionata, non prevalenza comunale.

records.title: Molecular Typing and Antimicrobial Susceptibility Profiles of Streptococcus uberis Isolated from Sheep Milk
records.notes: 124 isolati; 96.8% resistenti ad almeno un antimicrobico e 17 MDR. Il supplemento non consente una ripartizione geografica comunale.

records.title: Antimicrobial susceptibilities and population structure of Staphylococcus epidermidis associated with ovine mastitis
records.notes: 131 isolati da 2201 pecore in 14 greggi; 50 resistenti alla penicillina, 10 alla tetraciclina, 3 a entrambe. Nessun comune pubblicato.

records.title: Traceability, virulence and antimicrobial resistance of Yersinia enterocolitica in two industrial cheese-making plants
records.notes: 309 campioni raccolti nel 2018-2019; 7.4% positivi. Gli stabilimenti non sono identificati e non sono mappabili puntualmente.

records.title: Technological and Safety Characterization of Coagulase-Negative Staphylococci Isolated from Sardinian Fermented Sausage Made by Ovine Meat
records.notes: 70 colture CoNS; antibiogrammi su colture selezionate. Nessun comune pubblicato; evitare conteggi dettagliati finche non si risolve l'incongruenza testuale nell'articolo.

records.title: Occurrence of Antibiotic Resistance in Lacticaseibacillus paracasei and Lactiplantibacillus plantarum Strains Isolated from Traditional Sardinian Fermented Food
records.notes: 50 isolati, 25 da salsiccia ovina e 25 da formaggio Casizolu; nessun comune pubblicato.

records.title: Streptococcus ruminantium-associated sheep mastitis outbreak detected in Italy is distinct from bovine isolates
records.notes: 17 Sardinian isolates: all kanamycin-resistant and susceptible to the other tested classes; no AMR gene detected with AMRFinderPlus. BioProject reports Sardinia but no municipality.

records.title: Outbreak of mastitis in sheep caused by multi-drug resistant Enterococcus faecalis in Sardinia, Italy
records.notes: 699 samples, 48 E. faecalis isolates and 45 clonal MDR isolates. The source identifies only an anonymous intensive farm; no municipality is assigned.

records.title: Biodiversity and Safety Assessment of Half-Century Preserved Natural Starter Cultures for Pecorino Romano PDO Cheese
records.notes: Historical cultures SR30, SR56 and SR63; SR56 above cut-offs for clindamycin, erythromycin, gentamicin and tetracycline, with tetM. Historical food-chain evidence, not current municipal prevalence.

records.title: Antibiotic susceptibilities of livestock isolates of leptospira
records.notes: Eight recent livestock isolates from Sardinia had significantly higher cycline MICs than comparison isolates; the study does not support a regional prevalence estimate or farm-level publication.

records.title: Comparison of the incidence of virulence determinants and antibiotic resistance between Enterococcus faecium strains of dairy, animal and clinical origin
records.public_geography: Sardegna; fonti lattiero-casearie e cliniche aggregate
records.notes: Comparative source from Sardinian dairy, animal and clinical isolates. It is study-level evidence and does not identify a public municipality or an attributable source population.

records.title: Miocamycin-containing triple therapy for H. pylori infection
records.notes: The paper reports poor standard-therapy cure rates attributed to high local antimicrobial resistance and evaluates a miocamycin regimen. It is not a municipal prevalence estimate.

records.title: Colloidal bismuth subcitrate-based twice-a-day quadruple therapy as primary or salvage therapy for Helicobacter pylori infection
records.notes: The paper documents treatment context where standard triple therapies had cure rates below 60% largely because of antibiotic resistance. It does not quantify municipal resistance prevalence.

records.title: The antibiotic resistance patterns of Salmonella Typhi isolates in Italy, 1980-96
records.public_geography: Sardegna; un isolato di sorveglianza nazionale
records.notes: National surveillance reported one Sardinian isolate with intermediate chloramphenicol resistance. This is a historical, single-isolate regional stratum and not a Sardinian prevalence estimate.
